◎简　　介  

　　…All the Marbles (reissued as The California Dolls) is a 1981 comedy-drama  film about the trials and travails of a female wrestling  tag team and their manager. The film was directed by Robert Aldrich, and stars Peter Falk, Vicki Frederick, and Laurene Landon. Pittsburgh Steeler hall of famer "Mean" Joe Greene also plays himself in this film.Among the young unknown actresses ...
